page: Microsoft Azure M32bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family. It is powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. The configuration includes 32 vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. It features a 105 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel AMX (Advanced Matrix Extensions) for accelerated mathematical and cryptographic operations.

The server is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external block storage, though the instance is premium storage capable. The memory subsystem delivers a read-only cached bandwidth of 2764.98 GB/sec and an uncached large-block read bandwidth of 182.67 GB/sec.

Benchmark results show top-tier single-core performance, with Geekbench single-core, image processing, and text processing scores placing in the top 10%. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and static web serving throughput are also strong, landing in the top 25%. However, large-scale LLM inference is a notable bottleneck, yielding weak text generation speeds of 2.74 tokens/sec on 70B models. This hardware profile is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, enterprise applications, and moderate-scale data processing tasks that benefit from high single-core clock speeds and large memory capacities.
description: Microsoft Azure M32bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, featuring a dedicated 32-vCPU Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with 16 physical cores, it is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high 8.0 GB per core memory density. The instance lacks local storage, relying entirely on external premium block storage. Performance benchmarks indicate top-tier single-core capabilities, particularly in image and text processing, alongside strong multi-threaded decompression and static web serving throughput. Conversely, large-scale LLM inference represents a performance tradeoff, showing weak execution speeds on 70B models. This server is optimized for memory-heavy workloads, database management, and enterprise applications requiring high clock speeds and substantial memory capacity without local storage requirements.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M32bs_v3 is a memory-optimized VM featuring a 32-vCPU Intel Xeon processor at 4.0 GHz, 256 GB of RAM, and top-tier single-core performance for databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M32bs_v3 is a memory-optimized VM with 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon CPU, built for database and enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-frequency, memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processing and a dense memory-to-core ratio for demanding enterprise databases.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz
256.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core memory density
Top-tier single-core performance in image and text processing benchmarks
No local storage, requiring external premium block storage
Well-suited for memory-intensive databases and enterprise applications
